_comment: SANITIZED real-shape eLumen Public Portal response. Captured live 2026-05-30 from GET https://portalapi-laccd.elumenapp.com/public/courses (status=approved, tenant=lamission.elumenapp.com). PUBLIC, unauthenticated, no PII. Trimmed to fields the client reads. Leaf 'itemType' is the requisite discriminator (Prerequisite | Advisory | Co-Requisite); there is NO requisiteType field. Leaf codes are CONCATENATED (e.g. BIOTECH002, BIOLOGY005). Node 'type' is AND | OR | SINGLE. Shape is REAL; do not hand-edit the grammar.

courses.subject: MICRO
